title: Tri-State
text: Tri-State This property determines whether the CheckBox has three states (tri-state) or just two. True or False (default). TriState = " True | False " Value Description True The CheckBox has three states: True (selected, On), False (cleared, Off), and Undetermined, or default state False The CheckBox has just two states: True (selected, On) and False (cleared, Off) Description In character mode, the three possible states for the check box are defined by the device translation table mnemonics VIEW_CHECK , VIEW_CHECK_OFF , VIEW_CHECK_NULL . The widget’s video properties can be set by the $check_box assignment file setting. For more information, see Character Mode Widget Mnemonics . Example: Setting in ProcScript $properties(CHECK) = "tristate=true" Copy Applies to ucheckbox (CheckBox) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
